title: Workflow Orchestration Run
description: Contract 3 (orchestration extension) — the RUNTIME instance of a workflow: the run status plus the subtask tree that correlates each spawned task to its parent (the parent/child linkage that per-task agent.task.completed/failed events lack). DEFINED NOW for alignment; ENFORCEMENT TURNS ON in Phase 10 (Orchestrator). Backed by xagent.workflows (the run) + xagent.workflow_tasks (the tasks[] tree). Aggregate tokens_used/cost_usd roll up the tree; cost_budget_usd is the ceiling that trips an early-stop cancel on breach.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this contract schema, e.g. "1.0.0".

tenant_id.description: Organisation/tenant UUID that owns this run.

root_agent_id.description: The orchestrator agent that owns and drives this run.

root_task_id.description: The root task of the run (== delegation_root_task when A2A is ever involved).

goal.description: The natural-language goal driving this run.

mode.description: `solo` runs the orchestrator alone (single-agent); `subagents` decomposes and fans out to sub-agents.

decomposition.description: How the DAG was produced: a deterministic template match, or an LLM decomposition.

started_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp (ms precision) when the run started.

completed_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp (ms precision) when the run reached a terminal status.

cost_usd.description: Aggregate cost across all subtasks, in USD.

cost_budget_usd.description: Per-run cost ceiling; on breach the run is cancelled (early stop).

error_code.description: Contract-2 error code when the run failed (e.g. INVALID_DAG, BUDGET_EXCEEDED, APPROVAL_TIMEOUT).

output.description: The synthesized final result (e.g. {"message": "..."}). Present on completed. Total serialized size MUST NOT exceed 256 KiB.

tasks.description: The subtask tree: one entry per spawned node, with parent linkage.

run_task.description: One executed subtask node in the run tree.

node_id.description: The DAG node this task realizes.

parent_task_id.description: The parent task that spawned this one; NULL/absent for the root.

assigned_agent_id.description: The sub-agent that ran this node.

sender_agent_id.description: The agent that dispatched this node (the orchestrator, or a parent agent).

delegation_depth.description: Depth of this task in the delegation tree (root = 0).

cost_usd.description: Cost of this subtask in USD.

output.description: The subtask's summarized result returned to the orchestrator (summary + citations), NOT its full transcript.

$comment: additionalProperties:true throughout for forward-compatibility. Enforcement is Phase 10; services MUST accept this shape now and MUST NOT enforce it before then. This is the parent/child correlation the per-task agent.task.completed/.failed events lack; a companion Kafka event cypherx.agent.workflow.completed/.failed carries the run-tree fan-in. Sibling: workflows/dag.schema.json (the static graph).
